title: taraxacum scariosum
intro: Taraxacum scariosum, also known as the variable dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing liver and kidney problems, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and pain. Taraxacum scariosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its roots can be used in herbal preparations to make medicinal products.
